message:
feat(macros): compile-time JSON validation for schema examples

Add serde_json dependency to validate #[schema(example = "...")] JSON
strings at compile time during macro expansion instead of runtime.

Invalid JSON now produces a compile-time panic with a clear error message
rather than a runtime panic. The generated code comment is updated to
reflect that validation already happened ("JSON validated at compile time").

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@ quote = "1"
 syn = { version = "2", features = ["full", "parsing"] }
 # Used at compile time to validate regex patterns in #[validate(regex = "...")]
 regex = "1"
+# Used at compile time to validate JSON examples in #[schema(example = "...")]
+serde_json = "1"
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true
